title: GenPack
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Ycxnwqm.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) I've worked with a number of people and I'm hoping this can be a useful playlist to promote all the projects at once.
`and some standard mods too of course (unrelated to myself)` | Author | Packs/Mods | | :-: | :-: | | [Bizarre](https://modrinth.com/user/Bizarre)/[Collinvh](https://modrinth.com/user/Collinvh) | [![](https://i.imgur.com/dhyKK90.png "New World")](https://modrinth.com/project/b3n5Tc8T) | | [GenMode](https://modrinth.com/user/GenMode) | [![](https://i.imgur.com/PJ4jTnf.png "[CLOSED] - Stonecutter Salvage")](https://modrinth.com/project/w4oj6UFD) [![](https://i.imgur.com/r2v2UQI.png "Better Babies")](https://modrinth.com/project/W9qgAZfz) [![](https://i.imgur.com/NzWnHuE.png "Reader")](https://modrinth.com/project/F78KXQyP) [![](https://i.imgur.com/e0tO55I.png "Recipes Plus")](https://modrinth.com/project/RWf9UJdD) [![](https://i.imgur.com/WUJTrB1.png "Resolution")](https://modrinth.com/project/eOoqH4J0) [![](https://i.imgur.com/o78n1Rj.png "Vesture")](https://modrinth.com/project/L45eoNGD) | | [Nieadni](https://modrinth.com/user/Nieadni) | [![](https://i.imgur.com/bgdzWiw.png "HyliaCraft")](https://modrinth.com/project/Mb5k4RuW) [![](https://i.imgur.com/GIs8WVB.png "Unordinary Basics")](https://modrinth.com/project/SXVEjCsD) | | [StavWasPlayZ](https://modrinth.com/user/StavWasPlayZ) | [![](https://i.imgur.com/Gve9ldi.png "Even More Instruments")](https://modrinth.com/project/Mcs3cqJ1) [![](https://i.imgur.com/govFOmA.png "Genshin Instruments")](https://modrinth.com/project/UUD6Qkij) |
